name: Wilted Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 large cucumbers, peeled and thinly sliced
1 tablespoon fresh dill or 1 teaspoon dried dill weed
1 tablespoon salt for the wilting process (to be rinsed off)
1/2 teaspoon sugar substitute or real thing
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cucumber slices in a colander with 1 tablespoon of salt. Let them wilt for about an hour.
2. Rinse the salt off the cucumber slices and press out any excess water.
3. Combine the cucumber slices with Dijon mustard, white wine vinegar, canola oil, dill (fresh or dried), sugar substitute (or real sugar), and seasonings.
4. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Toss again before serving.
6. This salad is light and refreshing, making it a nice accompaniment to any entree at any time of the year. It's perfect for snacks or side dishes with dinner or lunch. Makes 4-6 servings.
